'''Dahon Indupar''' was [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Indupar/Legends|Indupar]] and its [[Induparan Crown Worlds|Crown Worlds]] during [[The galaxy/Legends|the Galactic]] [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Civil War]], as well as a member of the ancient [[House Indupar]].
